title: Day Counter (Legacy)
description: This datapack add text on top of your hotbar that will count the day realtime(1.16-).
body:
Similar in functionality to [Day Counter (Original)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/daycounter), but supports versions 1.15.2 and below.

But I deleted the coordinate display, now only the days and time display will be retained.

like this:

![Sample image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2f06e4545b152ee1fef719a1c2e58046459612c.png)
